Hoolheyak:TheLibraryPatch.NAME: The Library
DESCRIPTIONS: You find some precious rare books and record their contents.
OPTIONS: [Record] Choose and obtain #b1 #yRare card of a random color.

Hoolheyak:IntersectionOfPastAndPresent.NAME: Intersection of Past and Present
DESCRIPTIONS: The sound of scraping metal comes from behind you, followed by that signature male voice. NL ¥
NL It is the #yTin #yMan. Given your past encounters, you know full well that clashing with him will only put you at a disadvantage.
NL ¥
NL He shares some of his belongings with you. You then part ways.
NL ¥
NL As soon as his words fall, you feel your heart being #r@gripped@ for a moment. By the time you recover, he is gone.
NL ¥
NL He shoves two potions into your hands. You then part ways.

Hoolheyak:FalseDome.NAME: False Dome
DESCRIPTIONS: You finally climbed to the heights of the #ySpire. Looking up, the ceiling is inlaid with countless shimmering, bizarre ores. They are arranged according to some precise mathematical law, masquerading as a brilliant starry sky in this endless darkness. NL You pause. This false dome reminds you of an old acquaintance, a mad pioneer, and that spaceship that broke through the barriers of #yTerra.
You record the orbital laws of these forged stars in your mind; they confirm some of your previous hypotheses.
The past is not worth mentioning, and the present likewise leads to the future.
OPTIONS: [Analyze Trajectories] Choose #b3 cards in your deck to #gUpgrade.
[Seek the Future] #rRemove all #rCurse cards from your deck.

Hoolheyak:WaterLikeShape.NAME: Shape Like Water
DESCRIPTIONS: Clear water suddenly gushes from the cracks in the stone slabs beneath your feet. The stream swirls before you, gathering into an incredibly familiar figure. NL ¥
You look towards the voice; it is #yMuelsyse. NL ¥
Before you can finish speaking, a blast of water rushes at you. You raise your staff to block the attack. NL ¥
You sigh, pull out an extremely precious document from your files, and hand it over: ¥
NL #yMuelsyse stares at the document for a moment before snatching it away. ¥
She turns her head, her tone softening slightly, ¥
you point to the ruins behind her, ¥
NL ¥
NL In the split second the elf turns to look, you lightly leap onto a high wall. Of course, as a qualified agent, you don't forget to conveniently ¥
something from her before leaving.
NL You step over the now unconscious water elf, adjust your belongings, and continue onward.
OPTIONS: [Prepare for Battle] Enter a #rHard combat. Reward: #yRare Relic.
[Make an Excuse to Slip Away] Gain #b1 random #gCommon Relic.
